11.response: {"Q0":"Decision making, mental sharpness, fast calculations and reflexes during prolonged tedious task"}

13.response: {"Q0":"It is a bit painful, maybe add the astronaut leaving phase earlier"}

0.response: {"Q0":"In general when choosing the galaxy i would remember up or down and would try to remember that during the planet phase and then when I would return to the galaxy I was focused up or down and then I just had to press left or right"}

7.response: {"Q0":"It didnt make a difference until the blue astronaut left. After that I didnt want to search for the green gems on the blue planet"}

9.response: {"Q0":"selecting galaxies because thats what the game started with hand thats where the money was present. I didnt know how much real money the gold was worth"}

8.response: {"Q0":"Amount of money and probability of success during the lottery"}

BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"0. I am not discouraged about my future.","Q2":"0. I do not feel like a failure.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"0. I feel the same about myself as ever.","Q7":"0. I don't criticize or blame myself more than usual.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"0. I make decisions about as well as ever.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"1-. I sleep somewhat less than usual.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"1. I can't concentrate as well as usual.","Q20":"0. I am no more tired or fatigued than usual.","Q21":"0. I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex."}
